planMd:
# Plan: Generate and Save Exercises Based on Task Content and User Data

## Summary

Implement exercise generation logic that creates exercises based on task content and user data, saving them appropriately by type for review.

## Tasks

1. Implement Exercise Generation Logic Based on Task Content and User Data
2. Add Exercise Saving Functionality for Different Exercise Types (depends on: Implement Exercise Generation Logic Based on Task Content and User Data)
3. Create Unit Tests for Exercise Generation and Saving Functions (depends on: Add Exercise Saving Functionality for Different Exercise Types)
4. Integrate Exercise Generation and Saving into Task Completion Workflow (depends on: Create Unit Tests for Exercise Generation and Saving Functions)
5. Add End-to-End Tests for Exercise Generation and Saving on Task Completion (depends on: Integrate Exercise Generation and Saving into Task Completion Workflow)
